---
title: "Step2_DataClipping"
author: "E. Mendonsa"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


Packages
```{r message=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(readxl)

```


Import site visit log (dates and times)
```{r}

span <- read_excel("span.xlsx")


```
